title: Barely Default x Fresh Animations
description: An addon that bridges FreshLX's Fresh Animations with my Barely Default. This is the best Minecraft experience you can have
body:
Disclaimer: You will need to install OptiFine to take full advantage of this pack's features. That is all.

[Here's a list of mods](https://fabricmc.net/wiki/optifine-alternatives) that can replace some of OptiFine's features. So you can play with Barely Default's cool details without OptiFine
___

INSTALLATION GUIDE

 
Step 1. Download "Barely Default" by Mickey Joe (me) - [Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default)

Step 2. Download "Fresh Animations" by FreshLX - [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

Step 3. Get this addon

Step 4. Install the resource packs as follows:
![Pack install order](https://i.imgur.com/AB1YR7I.png)

Step 5. Scan my QR code(?)

Step 6. Enjoy Barely Default × Fresh Animations!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pqqLxtn983g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
PREVIEW VIDEO on my YouTube channel 👍
___

Huge thanks to FreshLX for allowing me to create this addon! The Fresh Animations are absolutely perfect, and it's an honour to work with him.

This collaboration was highly requested by the community, so we got together to get this done.

Please check out FreshLX online:

💰 support the works - Ko-Fi.com/FreshLX
🐦 Tweets - Twitter.com/Fresh_LX
🌎 projects on PMC - www.PlanetMinecraft.com/member/FreshLX/
___
